name: entity_change_story_sweep
description: Run substrate checks and baseline/context extraction. Optional explicit entity input can drive behavioural delta and story composition, but the pack does not auto-pivot on a suggested entity.

entity_value.description: Optional explicit entity to analyze. When omitted, this pack stops at context extraction and does not auto-pivot on a suggested entity.

seed_keywords.description: Optional extra seed keywords to correlate with the explicit entity.

baseline_start.description: Start date for the baseline window.

baseline_end.description: End date for the baseline window.

incident_start.description: Start date for the incident window.

incident_end.description: End date for the incident window.

match_mode.description: Matching mode for basename/keyword seeds. Usually exact or substring.
